heading: Absorption of costs within funds available
label: 4112 Absorption of costs within funds available
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 2319, , .July 7, 1958Pub. L. 85–507, § 2372 Stat. 338In subsection (a), the words “for each fiscal year” are substituted for “for the fiscal year in which this chapter is enacted and for each succeeding fiscal year”.In subsection (b), the prohibition is restated in positive form.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
Amendments1979—Subsec. (a). substituted “President” for “Director of the Bureau of the Budget”.Pub. L. 96–54

children.label: a
children.text: The President, to the extent he considers practicable, shall provide by regulation for the absorption of the costs of the training programs and plans under this chapter by the respective agencies from applicable appropriations or funds available for each fiscal year.
the separation of an individual from the service by reduction in force or other personnel action; or
the placement of an individual in a leave-without-pay status.
